name: jdy_update_data
description_zh: 修改表单中指定ID的一条记录
description: Update a single data record by data_id. The 'data' parameter uses the same format as create: {"_widget_xxx":{"value":"新值"}}. For subform fields, include _id in each row to retain existing rows; omit _id to add new rows. Returns the updated record. Use transaction_id (UUID) when updating file/image fields. Rate limit: 30/s.

data_id.description: 要修改的数据记录ID（_id字段）

is_start_trigger.description: 是否触发智能助手（默认false）

transaction_id.description: 含附件修改时必填，需与文件上传时使用的transaction_id一致
